ops.text: Restore the dynamic dimLevel parameter to the UI_TRAP transition mask instead of hardcoding 0.
Make UI_TRAP completely seamless by using WebViewClient.onPageFinished to mathematically clear the Dimmer mask, and explicitly enforce fitsSystemWindows to restore the OS Navigation Bar.
Refactor DynamicUIManager to use FrameLayout wrapper for safe-area insets and enable Notification Shade pull-down by preferring Application Overlays when not in full-screen mode.
